ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "network_code" TEXT /* Network code of the seismic station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Unique station code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station in WGS84 format */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station in WGS84 format */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the station */,
  "archive" INTEGER /* Archive location for the station's data */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the station's location */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place name of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the station operation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the station operation (if applicable) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the last maintenance (e.g., good, needs repair) */,
  "installation_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the station is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used at the station */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected by the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_archive FOREIGN KEY ("archive") REFERENCES data_archives ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_network_code FOREIGN KEY ("network_code") REFERENCES networks ("network_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each seismic network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the seismic network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network operations */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the network */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was established */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the network operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the affiliation */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the affiliation was established */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the affiliation operates */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_archives" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the archive */,
  "archive_name" TEXT /* Name of the archive */,
  "archive_location" TEXT /* Location of the archive */,
  "archive_capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the archive in MB */,
  "current_usage" REAL /* Current usage of the archive in MB */,
  "last_backup_date" TEXT /* Date of the last backup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place name */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "geological_features" TEXT /* Any significant geological features at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data or files accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was issued */,
  "recipients" TEXT /* List of recipients who received the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that detected the event */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the seismic event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the event location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the event location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the seismic event */,
  "epicenter" TEXT /* Coordinates of the epicenter */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the seismic event (e.g., natural, human-induced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data in the file (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which the report is generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details about the seismic activity in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
